raw.question: Factored broker-connection discovery into src/cli/lib/broker-connection.ts
raw.reasoning: Drive and view both need the same flag/env/connection.json fallback chain; pulling it out keeps both verbs aligned and unblocks future relay/new/run verbs from sub-PR 4.

events.content: Hand-rolled keybind state machine in drive.ts instead of pulling in readline.emitKeypressEvents

raw.question: Hand-rolled keybind state machine in drive.ts instead of pulling in readline.emitKeypressEvents
raw.chosen: Hand-rolled keybind state machine in drive.ts instead of pulling in readline.emitKeypressEvents
raw.reasoning: All bindings are ASCII control chars (Ctrl+G/Ctrl+C/Ctrl+B prefix). Tiny stateful parser handles cross-chunk Ctrl+B prefix cleanly and is trivially testable.
